title: Understanding Industrial IoT Gateways: A Comprehensive Guide
summary: Explore the fundamentals of industrial IoT gateways, their role in M2M communication, and how they enable secure connectivity between field devices and cloud platforms.
author: Tenet Networks Team

title: SD-WAN vs Traditional WAN: Why Enterprises Are Making the Switch
summary: Discover the key advantages of SD-WAN technology over traditional WAN infrastructure, including cost savings, improved performance, and centralized management.
author: Tenet Networks Team

title: 5G and Industrial IoT: Transforming Manufacturing (Part 1)
summary: The first part of our series exploring how 5G technology is revolutionizing industrial IoT deployments, with focus on ultra-low latency and massive connectivity.
author: Anil Joseph

title: 5G and Industrial IoT: Edge Computing Applications (Part 2)
summary: Part 2 explores how 5G enables edge computing in industrial environments, reducing latency and enabling real-time decision-making at the network edge.
author: Anil Joseph

title: Modernizing SCADA Systems with Cellular Connectivity
summary: Learn how cellular M2M gateways are helping utilities and industrial operators modernize legacy SCADA infrastructure for better reliability and remote access.
author: Zahid Hussain
